headline: Veralto (VLTO): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q4 Earnings?
summary: Over the past six months, Veralto’s stock price fell to $90.54. Shareholders have lost 11.9% of their capital, which is disappointing considering the S&P 500 has climbed by 5.4%. This may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

headline: Brown Advisory Large-Cap Growth Strategy Q1 2026 Portfolio Review
summary: Netflix outperformed during the period as investor concerns around a potential acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery subsided.
